sn1.10:1.2: Standing to one side, a devatā addressed the Blessed One with a verse:
sn1.10:2.3: eating just one meal a day:
sn1.10:2.4: why are their faces so bright & serene?”
sn1.10:3.1: The Buddha: “They don’t sorrow over the past,
sn1.10:3.4: That’s why their faces are bright & serene.
sn1.10:4.4: like a green reed cut down.”
